title: vaccinium prostratum
intro: Vaccinium prostratum, also known as the creeping bilberry or prostrate blueberry, is a low-growing, woody shrub native to the mountainous regions of Japan and Korea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Vaccinium prostratum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Vaccinium prostratum can be prepared as herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
